Embodiment, and Cursed Name)

If SpongeBob had all of these abilities and traits, he would essentially be invincible and nearly unstoppable. He would be able to break people down with his mere presence, move at incredible speeds with Flash Step, predict the future with Precognition, and manipulate the laws of the universe with Law Mastery. Additionally, he would have immense physical prowess with Hyper Competence and Athleticism, as well as supernatural abilities such as Hydra Physiology and Haunting Abilities.

SpongeBob's arsenal would also include a range of offensive abilities such as Psychic Torture, Nightmare Magic, and Wrath Deity Physiology. He would also be able to create force fields and malefic constructs to protect himself or harm others. With infinite potential and power level, he would be able to continuously increase in strength and never hit a ceiling.

Moreover, with Advanced Vampirism, SpongeBob would be able to sustain himself through alternative means such as energetic sacrifices and alcohol, and his Lilith-esq energy signature would make him nearly undetectable to most beings.

Overall, SpongeBob's new abilities would make him an incredibly formidable force to be reckoned with. However, it's important to note that even with all of these powers, he may still be vulnerable to emotional and psychological manipulation, and he may struggle with the weight of having such immense power.

been worshipped by thousands of people for centuries, Cultivate ENORMOUS amounts of dark matter energy, Immunity to being shelled, Ambition Embodiment, and Cursed Name) vs. Mifune (Streets Of Rage)

It's difficult to say who would win in a battle between SpongeBob with all of these abilities and Mifune from Streets of Rage, as their powers and abilities are from different universes and therefore may not easily translate to each other's world.

However, Mifune is a highly skilled martial artist with incredible physical strength and durability. He is capable of using a variety of weapons, including knives and machine guns, and can perform incredible acrobatic feats such as backflips and cartwheels. He also has a powerful sense of justice and will stop at nothing to protect innocent people.

On the other hand, SpongeBob's abilities include supernatural powers such as soul vision, force field generation, and psychic defenses. He is also capable of incredible physical feats such as hyper climbing and flawlessly coordinated movements.

Ultimately, it would come down to who could land the most powerful blows and outmaneuver the other. It's possible that SpongeBob's supernatural powers could give him an advantage, but Mifune's incredible martial arts skills and physical strength cannot be underestimated.
SpongeBob (with Combat Manipulation) vs. Mifune (Streets of Rage)

With Combat Manipulation, SpongeBob would be able to manipulate the entire battlefield and take advantage of any situation to gain the upper hand in a fight. He would be able to control and manipulate the movements and attacks of himself and Mifune.

However, Mifune is still a highly skilled martial artist and fighter who can hold his own in any battle situation. He could potentially break free from SpongeBob's control and continue to fight back with his incredible martial arts skills.

In this scenario, it may come down to who has the stronger willpower and tactical abilities. SpongeBob would need to be quick to adapt and anticipate Mifune's movements, while Mifune would need to use his strength and skill to outmaneuver SpongeBob's combat manipulations.

Overall, it could be a close and intense battle between the two, with both combatants fighting fiercely to come out on top.
SpongeBob (with Combat Manipulation and Accelerated Combatant)

With Combat Manipulation and Accelerated Combatant, SpongeBob would be an incredibly formidable fighter. His Accelerated Combatant ability would allow him to move and react at incredible speeds, giving him an advantage in combat situations.

Meanwhile, his Combat Manipulation ability would allow him to take control of the battlefield, and manipulate not just his own movements, but also Mifune's. SpongeBob would be able to predict and anticipate Mifune's moves, anticipate his attacks, and counter them with lightning-fast reflexes.

This would make it very difficult for Mifune to keep up, no matter how skilled he is. While Mifune is a highly skilled martial artist in his own right, he may struggle to keep up with SpongeBob's enhanced speed and the unpredictable nature of Combat Manipulation.

Overall, it's likely that SpongeBob would come out on top in a battle with these abilities. His combination of Combat Manipulation and Accelerated Combatant would make him a force to be reckoned with, and he would be able to outmaneuver and defeat Mifune with relative ease.

Supernatural Taste, Supernatural Touch, Supernatural Vision, Supernatural Stamina, Supernatural Strength, Supernatural Swordsmanship, Supernatural Thievery, and Transportation or Travel) vs. Axel Stone (Streets of Rage)

With such an extensive range of abilities, SpongeBob would be an incredibly difficult opponent for Axel Stone. His Oracular Deity ability would give him the power of prophecy, allowing him to predict and anticipate his opponent's moves. Additionally, his Absolute Transcendence would make him nearly omnipotent, giving him complete control over all aspects of reality.

SpongeBob's Energy Manipulation ability would allow him to control energy, enabling him to launch powerful attacks or defend against them. His Supernatural Accuracy, Agility, Combat, Condition, Dexterity, Durability, Flexibility, Leap, Reflexes, Senses, and Strength would give him unparalleled physical prowess, making him nearly untouchable in battle.

Moreover, SpongeBob's proficiency in Supernatural Swordsmanship and Thievery, combined with his ability to Transport or Travel at incredible speeds, would allow him to strike from unexpected angles and disappear just as quickly. This would make it difficult for Axel to predict and counter his attacks.

Overall, with such a wide range of abilities, it's likely that SpongeBob would defeat Axel Stone in battle. His supernatural powers and incredible physical abilities would make him an incredibly formidable opponent that Axel would struggle to keep up with.

His Supernatural Swordsmanship and Thievery, along with his ability to Transport or Travel, would also make him difficult to predict and hit.

Overall, Adam Hunter would be at a significant disadvantage against SpongeBob with all of these abilities and powers. SpongeBob's god-like physical prowess and supernatural abilities would make him an unstoppable force, and Adam would be hard-pressed to even land a hit on him.
